observations.summary: The implement-story step stopped at Task 4 of 9 (responseExcerpt ends mid-task: 'Now Task 5: Extend AgentService.'), leaving 25 skipped tests and Tasks 5-8 for the unit-tests step to implement; recurs despite the 2.3 prompt update, likely because 3.4 is a larger story (9 tasks, 49 tests).
observations.evidence: Journal step_end for implement-story: responseExcerpt 'All 11 classifier tests pass. Now Task 5: Extend AgentService.' (status: success, durationMs: 785182). Journal step_end for unit-tests: '25 it.skip() tests found across 3 files, all un-skipped' and 'Implemented: AgentService (full tool call lifecycle...), StreamingController (SSE heartbeat...), StreamingModule, ConversationPane, ChatMessageList'. Ledger: fingerprint recorded for Stories 2.1 and 2.3 (distinctRuns: 2), update_step applied to implement-story in run 2.3-a1-20260703T092056. No runner-errors entry for this step.

observations.summary: 3 out-of-scope Playwright skips from Stories 1.2/1.3 persist and are deferred per DP-5 on every run; recurs from Story 3.3 where 8 skips were recorded.
observations.evidence: Journal step_end for review-tests: '3 out-of-scope Playwright skips (Stories 1.2/1.3) — all have recorded reasons (environmental dependencies / conditional env-var skip). No action needed for Story 3.4.' Ledger: fingerprint recorded for Story 3.3 (distinctRuns: 1).

observations.summary: The prepare-tests step creates 'TDD RED PHASE' headers in test files; the unit-tests step un-skips tests but does not update the headers; review-tests catches the stale headers as FINDING-01 but does not fix them, leaving documentation that claims tests are skipped when they are active.
observations.evidence: Journal step_end for review-tests: '4 stale TDD RED PHASE headers in ToolPill.test.tsx, SemanticPill.test.tsx, tool-pill-classifier.service.spec.ts, agent.service.unit.spec.ts — headers claim tests are skipped but they are all active. FINDING-01 (MEDIUM, trivial fix).' and 'Next step: Fix FINDING-01 (update stale headers to green-phase) — it's a 4-file, 8-line change.' No subsequent step_end mentions resolving the stale headers.
